subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-05 in Stuttgart
subcodes.first_line: The inhabitants of Stuttgart and Esslingen are very warm-hearted; they are sincerely devoted and wholly filled with the Teachings of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: اهل استتکارت و اسلنگن خیلی گرمند بسیار صادق و منجذبند و از سایر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @predictions and prophecies, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @symbolism
